meta.title: Digital Content Creator Pathways | Who's to Say ? Foundation
meta.description: Build confidence and practical media skills through defined digital storytelling, design, photography, and production projects.

hero.title: Digital Content Creator Pathways
hero.subtitle: Video, design, photography, and production skills — built one project at a time with defined creative deliverables.
hero.bestFor: People interested in content creation, storytelling, portfolio projects, and practical digital media skills.

blocks.html: Digital Content Creator Pathways helps people build confidence and practical skills in digital media, design, and technology through defined creative projects. The focus is project-based learning, participant-owned work, and clear deliverables.

items: Creating clips, using templates, adding captions, and applying simple effects
Exporting and safely sharing finished videos
Creating graphics in Canva or similar tools
Designing stickers, simple posters, portfolio graphics, and social media images
Understanding basic visual branding concepts such as color, layout, readability, and consistency
Using a smartphone or DSLR camera
Photo-assistant basics, lighting, framing, and simple editing
Building a small portfolio of images for a personal project or showcase
Basics of microphones, lighting, and camera setup
Being on camera vs. behind the camera
Working through a simple creative brief from idea to finished piece
Increased comfort with technology and media tools
Improved communication, sequencing, planning, and project completion
A small digital portfolio or finished creative asset that can be shared when appropriate
Experience working toward a defined project goal and deadline

sessionStyle.title: Session Style
items: Individual creator projects or small-group workshops
Portfolio or deliverable growth over time

getStarted.title: Get Started
getStarted.prompt: Want to explore a Digital Path project?

blocks.html: Sessions are scoped around a defined creative project. A participant might edit a gaming clip, design a logo, record a podcast segment, take photos, or build a short portfolio piece.
